title: Front Office Manager - Delaware North India - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - Delaware North India - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Delaware North India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Front Office Manager to join our dynamic team in Mysuru. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Delaware North India:
Delaware North India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Travel Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Delaware North India!
